targets.expr: sum(max without(prometheus_replica) (increase(velero_backup_failure_total{cluster=~"$cluster", schedule=~"$schedule"}[$__range]))) / clamp_min(sum(max without(prometheus_replica) (increase(velero_backup_attempt_total{cluster=~"$cluster", schedule=~"$schedule"}[$__range]))), 1)
